Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.pretranslation

Class TextualJMLLoopSpec

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.pretranslation.TextualJMLConstruct
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.pretranslation.TextualJMLLoopSpec
public final class TextualJMLLoopSpec extends TextualJMLConstruct
A JML loop specification (invariant, assignable clause, decreases clause, ...) in textual form.
